_comment: Stub The Daily entries for Wave 3 (Sprint 14). Replace with live The Daily DB query when that sprint ships.

takes.headline: Iowa's tempo is the most interesting offensive story of the spring
takes.body: 78 plays in 90 minutes during HI's count of practice three. Iowa's all-time spring average is 51. The new OC's first public statement about what this offense will be.

takes.headline: The Boise zero-first-round-pick math is honest
takes.body: Cincinnati 2021 had the same silhouette and made the CFP. Take the comparison seriously.

takes.headline: FSU's quiet boards are the leading indicator
takes.body: The fan-board sentiment turned three weeks before the trackers caught it. Fans are reading correctly.

archive.title: What Sarkisian said at the spring presser
archive.summary: He didn't say roster — he said *room*. Word choice matters.

archive.title: Why the Big 12 boards are quiet
archive.summary: Quiet, in fan-voice, usually means we don't think we beat them.

archive.title: Indiana's edge transfer echoes 2023
archive.summary: Cignetti's 2023 Coastal pickup was identical in shape.

archive.title: The Heupel-2015 echo Tennessee fans missed
archive.summary: Same first-quarter script. Same depth chart shape.

archive.title: Reading the Auburn fanbase's anger arc
archive.summary: Anger to fatigue to numbness to acceptance. The standard CFP-loss arc.
